Draft Recommendation Screening and Interventions to Reduce 
Unhealthy Alcohol Use 
ABOUT THE USPSTF The U.S. Preventive Services Task Force is a scientifically independent, volunteer panel of national experts in disease prevention and evidence-based medicine. The Task Force works to improve the health of people nationwide by making evidence-based recommendations about clinical preventive services.
